_note: Curated starter offers. These populate the catalog with real, honest deals BEFORE affiliate networks are connected. Edit freely and re-run `python cli.py seed-curated` (idempotent). Prefer code-less 'deal' entries (store-wide sales) which are always honest; only add a 'code' when you have verified it works. Once affiliate feeds are live, the engine keeps these alongside auto-discovered coupons.
